things.name: Intramuros (Walled City)
things.description: 16th-century Spanish colonial walled city with Fort Santiago and San Agustin Church

things.name: Rizal Park (Luneta)
things.description: National park where national hero Jose Rizal was executed in 1896 - cultural focal point

things.name: San Agustin Church
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage oldest stone building in the Philippines, built by Augustine friars in 1607

things.name: Binondo Chinatown
things.description: World's oldest Chinatown (1594) with excellent Chinese Filipino food and colonial churches

things.name: National Museum of Fine Arts
things.description: Philippines' finest art collection in the neoclassical old Congress building

things.name: BGC (Bonifacio Global City)
things.description: Manila's ultra-modern district with contemporary art, craft beer and food parks

things.name: Corregidor Island
things.description: WWII battleground island at the entrance to Manila Bay with preserved ruins and war memorials

things.name: Quiapo Church & Market
things.description: Minor basilica housing the Black Nazarene - patron of Manila's Catholic faithful

things.name: Malacanang Palace
things.description: Official residence of Philippine presidents with museum tours on certain days

things.name: Night Life at Poblacion
things.description: Manila's hippest neighbourhood with speakeasies, craft bars and street food
